sentences.sentence: Though we might think of film as an essentially visual experience, we really cannot afford to underestimate the importance of film sound.
sentences.translation: 尽管我们可能认为电影本质上是一种视觉体验，但我们实在不能低估电影声音的重要性。

structure.text: Though we might think of film as an essentially visual experience
really cannot afford to underestimate the importance of film sound

difficult_points: Though 引导让步状语从句，先承认电影是视觉体验，再转折强调声音的重要性。
cannot afford to do 表示“承受不起……的后果”，语气比“不应该”更强。
think of ... as ... 表示“把……看作……”。

expressions.meaning_zh: 承受不起做某事的后果

sentences.sentence: A meaningful soundtrack is often as complicated as the image on the screen, and is ultimately just as much the responsibility of the director.
sentences.translation: 一段有意义的配乐往往和银幕上的画面同样复杂，最终也同样是导演的责任。

structure.text: is often as complicated as the image on the screen
and is ultimately just as much the responsibility of the director

difficult_points: as complicated as 是同级比较结构，指配乐与画面同样复杂。
just as much the responsibility of 意为“同样也是……的责任”，隐含与前文对画面负责程度的比较。
is 是与前一分句并列的谓语，共同的主语是 A meaningful soundtrack。

sentences.sentence: The entire soundtrack consists of three essential ingredients: the human voice, sound effects and music.
sentences.translation: 整条配乐由三个基本要素组成：人声、音效和音乐。

structure.text: the human voice, sound effects and music

difficult_points: 冒号后列举的内容是对 three essential ingredients 的具体说明，相当于同位语。
consist of 表示“由……组成”，强调构成要素。

sentences.sentence: These three tracks must be mixed and balanced so as to produce the necessary emphases which in turn create desired effects.
sentences.translation: 这三条声音轨道必须经过混音和平衡处理，以便产生必要的强调效果，进而营造出预期的效果。

structure.text: so as to produce the necessary emphases
which in turn create desired effects

difficult_points: must be mixed and balanced 是被动语态，three tracks 是被混音和平衡的对象。
so as to 引导目的状语，意为“以便”。
which in turn create desired effects 是修饰 emphases 的定语从句，in turn 表示“继而、进而”。

sentences.sentence: Topics which essentially refer to the three previously mentioned tracks are discussed below.
sentences.translation: 下文将讨论那些主要与前面提到的三条轨道相关的话题。

structure.text: which essentially refer to the three previously mentioned tracks

difficult_points: which essentially refer to ... 是修饰 Topics 的定语从句。
are discussed below 是被动语态，指这些话题将在下文讨论。

sentences.sentence: They include dialogue, synchronous and asynchronous sound effects, and music.
sentences.translation: 这些话题包括对白、同步音效和异步音效，以及音乐。

structure.text: include dialogue, synchronous and asynchronous sound effects, and music

difficult_points: They 指代前一句提到的 Topics，即下文将依次讨论的四类内容。
synchronous and asynchronous 并列修饰 sound effects，指同步音效与异步音效两类。

sentences.sentence: Let us start with dialogue.
sentences.translation: 让我们先从对白说起。
difficult_points: Let us do 是“让我们做……”的常见提议表达，此处引出下文话题。
start with 表示“从……开始”，指讨论顺序。

sentences.sentence: As is the case with stage drama, dialogue serves to tell the story and expresses feelings and motivations of characters as well.
sentences.translation: 正如舞台剧的情况一样，对白既承担叙事功能，也表达人物的情感与动机。

structure.text: As is the case with stage drama
and expresses feelings and motivations of characters as well

difficult_points: As is the case with ... 是固定句式，意为“正如……的情况一样”，用来类比舞台剧。
serves to do 表示“起到……的作用”。
as well 位于句末，表示“同样、也”，呼应前面的舞台剧对比。

sentences.sentence: Often with film characterization the audience perceives little or no difference between the character and the actor.
sentences.translation: 在电影塑造人物形象时，观众常常几乎察觉不到角色与演员之间的差别。

structure.text: perceives little or no difference between the character and the actor

difficult_points: with film characterization 是状语，说明感知发生的背景是电影塑造人物的过程中。
little or no difference 表示“几乎没有差别”。

sentences.sentence: Thus, for example, the actor Humphrey Bogart is the character Sam Spade; film personality and life personality seem to merge.
sentences.translation: 例如，演员亨弗莱·鲍嘉就是角色山姆·斯佩德本身；银幕人格与现实人格似乎融为一体。

structure.text: film personality and life personality seem to merge

difficult_points: 分号连接两个语义相关的独立分句，第二句是对第一句现象的概括。
Humphrey Bogart is the character Sam Spade 举例说明演员与角色高度融合的现象。
seem to do 表示“似乎……”，语气委婉。

sentences.sentence: Perhaps this is because the very texture of a performer's voice supplies an element of character.
sentences.translation: 也许这是因为演员嗓音本身的质感就赋予了角色某种特质。

structure.text: because the very texture of a performer's voice supplies an element of character

difficult_points: this 指代前文演员与角色融合的现象。
the very texture of ... 中 very 起强调作用，意为“正是……本身”。

sentences.sentence: When voice textures fit the performer's physiognomy and gestures, a whole and very realistic persona emerges.
sentences.translation: 当嗓音质感与演员的相貌和肢体动作相契合时，一个完整而极为逼真的人物形象便应运而生。

structure.text: When voice textures fit the performer's physiognomy and gestures
a whole and very realistic persona

difficult_points: When 引导时间/条件状语从句，说明人物形象逼真的前提条件。
fit 在此表示“与……相符、相匹配”。

sentences.sentence: The viewer sees not an actor working at his craft, but another human being struggling with life.
sentences.translation: 观众看到的不是一个在雕琢技艺的演员，而是一个在生活中挣扎的普通人。

structure.text: sees not an actor working at his craft, but another human being struggling with life

difficult_points: not A but B 结构对比“看到的不是A而是B”。
working at his craft 和 struggling with life 分别是现在分词短语，修饰 actor 和 human being。

sentences.sentence: It is interesting to note that how dialogue is used and the very amount of dialogue used varies widely among films.
sentences.translation: 值得注意的是，不同电影中对白的使用方式以及对白的使用量都存在很大差异。

structure.text: that how dialogue is used and the very amount of dialogue used varies widely among films
how dialogue is used and the very amount of dialogue used

difficult_points: It is interesting to note that ... 中 it 是形式主语，真正内容由 that 从句表达。
that 从句中，how dialogue is used 与 the very amount of dialogue used 是并列主语，共同支配谓语 varies。

expressions.text: it is interesting to note that

sentences.sentence: For example, in the highly successful science-fiction film 2001, little dialogue was evident, and most of it was banal and of little intrinsic interest.
sentences.translation: 例如，在极为成功的科幻电影《2001太空漫游》中，对白很少，而且大多平淡无味、本身也没什么意思。

structure.text: in the highly successful science-fiction film 2001
and most of it was banal and of little intrinsic interest

difficult_points: little dialogue 表示“几乎没有对白”，little 在此为否定含义的限定词。
of little intrinsic interest 意为“本身没什么意思”，of + 名词短语作表语。

sentences.sentence: In this way the filmmaker was able to portray what Thomas Sobochack and Vivian Sobochack call, in An Introduction to Film, the 'inadequacy of human responses when compared with the magnificent technology created by man and the visual beauties of the universe'.
sentences.translation: 通过这种方式，导演得以呈现出托马斯·索伯查克与薇薇安·索伯查克在《电影概论》一书中所说的——与人类创造的宏伟科技以及宇宙的视觉之美相比，人类反应显得多么不足。

structure.text: the filmmaker was able to portray
what Thomas Sobochack and Vivian Sobochack call
the 'inadequacy of human responses when compared with the magnificent technology created by man and the visual beauties of the universe'
when compared with the magnificent technology created by man and the visual beauties of the universe

difficult_points: what ... call ... the 'inadequacy ...' 是 what 引导的宾语从句，what 在从句中作 call 的宾语，'inadequacy...' 是宾语补足语。
in An Introduction to Film 是插入语，说明这个说法出自该书。
when compared with ... 是省略主语的状语从句，补全为 when it is compared with，指人类反应与技术、宇宙之美相比时显得不足。

sentences.sentence: The comedy Bringing Up Baby, on the other hand, presents practically non-stop dialogue delivered at breakneck speed.
sentences.translation: 另一方面，喜剧片《育婴奇谭》则呈现出几乎不间断、语速极快的对白。
difficult_points: on the other hand 是插入的转折状语，与上一段的电影形成对比。
delivered at breakneck speed 是过去分词短语，修饰 dialogue，意为“以极快速度说出的”。

sentences.sentence: This use of dialogue underscores not only the dizzy quality of the character played by Katherine Hepburn, but also the absurdity of the film itself and thus its humor.
sentences.translation: 这种对白的运用不仅突显了凯瑟琳·赫本所饰演角色的癫狂特质，也凸显了影片本身的荒诞感及其由此产生的幽默效果。

structure.text: underscores not only the dizzy quality of the character
but also the absurdity of the film itself and thus its humor

difficult_points: not only ... but also ... 连接 underscores 的两个并列宾语。
played by Katherine Hepburn 是过去分词短语，修饰 the character。
thus its humor 承接前面内容，表示由此产生的幽默效果。

sentences.sentence: The audience is bounced from gag to gag and conversation to conversation; there is no time for audience reflection.
sentences.translation: 观众被从一个笑点抛到下一个笑点、从一段对话抛到下一段对话；根本没有时间进行反思。

structure.text: is bounced from gag to gag and conversation to conversation
there is no time for audience reflection

difficult_points: is bounced 是被动语态，把观众比作被抛来抛去的对象，形象化地表现节奏之快。
from gag to gag and conversation to conversation 表示“从一个笑点到另一个笑点、从一段对话到另一段对话”，强调连续不断。

sentences.sentence: The audience is caught up in a whirlwind of activity in simply managing to follow the plot.
sentences.translation: 观众仅仅为了跟上情节，就已经被卷入一场活动的旋风之中。

structure.text: is caught up in a whirlwind of activity
in simply managing to follow the plot

difficult_points: be caught up in 表示“卷入、陷入”，a whirlwind of activity 比喻活动的密集与混乱。
in managing to follow the plot 中 in + 动名词表示“在做……的过程中”。

sentences.sentence: This film presents pure escapism – largely due to its frenetic dialogue.
sentences.translation: 这部影片呈现出一种纯粹的逃避现实感——这在很大程度上要归功于其癫狂的对白节奏。

structure.text: largely due to its frenetic dialogue

difficult_points: 破折号后 largely due to ... 补充说明前面纯粹的逃避现实感主要归因于疯狂的对白。
escapism 指“逃避现实”，此处指电影带来的沉浸式消遣体验。

sentences.sentence: Synchronous sound effects are those sounds which are synchronized or matched with what is viewed.
sentences.translation: 同步音效指的是那些与画面所呈现内容相同步或相匹配的声音。

structure.text: which are synchronized or matched with what is viewed

difficult_points: which 引导定语从句修饰 those sounds。
what is viewed 是 what 引导的名词从句，作 with 的宾语，指“所看到的画面内容”。

sentences.sentence: For example, if the film portrays a character playing the piano, the sounds of the piano are projected.
sentences.translation: 例如，如果影片描绘一个角色正在弹钢琴，画面中就会播放出钢琴的声音。

structure.text: if the film portrays a character playing the piano
the sounds of the piano are projected

difficult_points: playing the piano 是现在分词短语，修饰 a character，表示“正在弹钢琴的角色”。
are projected 是被动语态，指钢琴声被播放、呈现出来。

sentences.sentence: Synchronous sounds contribute to the realism of film and also help to create a particular atmosphere.
sentences.translation: 同步音效既有助于增强电影的真实感，也有助于营造特定的氛围。

structure.text: contribute to the realism of film
and also help to create a particular atmosphere

difficult_points: contribute to 表示“有助于、促成”。
help to do 与前一并列谓语共享主语 Synchronous sounds。

sentences.sentence: For example, the 'click' of a door being opened may simply serve to convince the audience that the image portrayed is real, and the audience may only subconsciously note the expected sound.
sentences.translation: 例如，一扇门被打开时发出的“咔嗒”声，可能只是为了让观众相信画面所呈现的场景是真实的，而观众可能只是在潜意识里注意到了这个预期中的声音。

structure.text: the 'click' of a door being opened
may simply serve to convince the audience
that the image portrayed is real
and the audience may only subconsciously note the expected sound

difficult_points: a door being opened 中 being opened 是被动动名词，修饰 door，表示“正在被打开的门”。
serve to do 表示“起到……的作用”，convince ... that ... 后接从句说明说服的内容。
subconsciously 修饰 note，指观众下意识地注意到，而非有意识地注意到。

sentences.sentence: However, if the 'click' of an opening door is part of an ominous action such as a burglary, the sound mixer may call attention to the 'click' with an increase in volume; this helps to engage the audience in a moment of suspense.
sentences.translation: 然而，如果开门的“咔嗒”声是入室盗窃等不祥举动的一部分，混音师可能会通过提高音量来突出这个声音；这有助于让观众沉浸在悬念之中。

structure.text: if the 'click' of an opening door is part of an ominous action such as a burglary
may call attention to the 'click' with an increase in volume
this helps to engage the audience in a moment of suspense

difficult_points: such as a burglary 举例说明 ominous action 的具体内容。
call attention to ... with an increase in volume 表示通过提高音量的方式引起对某声音的注意。
this 指代前面“提高音量以突出咔嗒声”这一做法。

sentences.sentence: Asynchronous sound effects, on the other hand, are not matched with a visible source of the sound on screen.
sentences.translation: 另一方面，异步音效在画面上没有与之对应的可见声音来源。

structure.text: are not matched with a visible source of the sound on screen

difficult_points: on the other hand 承接上文，与同步音效形成对比。
are not matched with ... 是被动语态，指异步音效在画面上没有可见的声音来源。

sentences.sentence: Such sounds are included so as to provide an appropriate emotional nuance, and they may also add to the realism of the film.
sentences.translation: 加入这些声音是为了提供恰当的情感色彩，同时也有助于增强影片的真实感。

structure.text: so as to provide an appropriate emotional nuance
and they may also add to the realism of the film

difficult_points: so as to 引导目的状语。
add to 表示“增加、增强”。

sentences.sentence: For example, a filmmaker might opt to include the background sound of an ambulance's siren while the foreground sound and image portrays an arguing couple.
sentences.translation: 例如，导演可能选择加入救护车鸣笛的背景声，而前景的声音和画面呈现的却是一对正在争吵的情侣。

structure.text: might opt to include the background sound of an ambulance's siren
while the foreground sound and image portrays an arguing couple

difficult_points: opt to do 表示“选择做某事”。
while 在此表对比，指背景声音与前景画面所呈现内容不同，形成反差。

sentences.sentence: The asynchronous ambulance siren underscores the psychic injury incurred in the argument; at the same time the noise of the siren adds to the realism of the film by acknowledging the film's city setting.
sentences.translation: 这段不同步的救护车鸣笛声突显了争吵中造成的心理创伤；与此同时，鸣笛声也通过点明影片的城市背景，增强了影片的真实感。

structure.text: at the same time the noise of the siren adds to the realism of the film
by acknowledging the film's city setting

difficult_points: incurred in the argument 是过去分词短语，修饰 psychic injury，指争吵中造成的心理伤害。
分号连接两个语义相关的独立分句，第二句补充说明鸣笛声的另一重作用。
by acknowledging ... 表示手段，指通过点明电影的城市背景来增强真实感。

sentences.sentence: We are probably all familiar with background music in films, which has become so ubiquitous as to be noticeable in its absence.
sentences.translation: 我们大概都对电影中的背景音乐十分熟悉，它已经变得如此无处不在，以至于一旦缺失反而会引人注意。

structure.text: are probably all familiar with background music in films
which has become so ubiquitous as to be noticeable in its absence
so ubiquitous as to be noticeable in its absence

difficult_points: which 引导非限定性定语从句，修饰 background music in films。
so ... as to ... 表示“如此……以至于……”，指背景音乐无处不在，以至于一旦缺失反而会被注意到。

sentences.sentence: We are aware that it is used to add emotion and rhythm.
sentences.translation: 我们知道，背景音乐是用来增添情感和节奏感的。

structure.text: that it is used to add emotion and rhythm

difficult_points: that 引导宾语从句，说明 aware 的具体内容。
it 指代前一句提到的 background music。

sentences.sentence: Usually not meant to be noticeable, it often provides a tone or an emotional attitude toward the story and/or the characters depicted.
sentences.translation: 背景音乐通常并不打算引人注意，它往往为故事情节和／或影片所刻画的人物营造出某种基调或情感态度。

structure.text: Usually not meant to be noticeable
often provides a tone or an emotional attitude toward the story and/or the characters

difficult_points: 句首过去分词短语 Usually not meant to be noticeable 修饰主语 it，相当于 as it is usually not meant to be noticeable。
depicted 是过去分词，修饰 the characters，表示“影片所刻画的人物”。

sentences.sentence: In addition, background music often foreshadows a change in mood.
sentences.translation: 此外，背景音乐常常预示着情绪上的转变。

structure.text: often foreshadows a change in mood

difficult_points: In addition 表示补充说明。
foreshadow 表示“预示、预兆”。

sentences.sentence: For example, dissonant music may be used in film to indicate an approaching (but not yet visible) menace or disaster.
sentences.translation: 例如，影片中可能使用不和谐的音乐来暗示一种正在逼近、却尚未在画面中显现的威胁或灾难。

structure.text: to indicate an approaching (but not yet visible) menace or disaster

difficult_points: may be used ... to indicate ... 中不定式表示目的。
(but not yet visible) 是插入的括号说明，补充修饰 an approaching menace or disaster，强调威胁尚未显现于画面。

sentences.sentence: Background music may aid viewer understanding by linking scenes.
sentences.translation: 背景音乐可以通过连接不同场景来帮助观众理解剧情。
difficult_points: by linking scenes 表示方式，说明背景音乐通过连接场景来帮助观众理解。
aid viewer understanding 意为“帮助观众理解”，aid 后直接跟名词作宾语。

sentences.sentence: For example, a particular musical theme associated with an individual character or situation may be repeated at various points in a film in order to remind the audience of salient motifs or ideas.
sentences.translation: 例如，与某个特定人物或情境相关联的特定音乐主题，可能会在影片的多个节点重复出现，以提醒观众注意某些重要的主题或想法。

structure.text: associated with an individual character or situation
may be repeated at various points in a film
in order to remind the audience of salient motifs or ideas

difficult_points: associated with ... 是过去分词短语，修饰 a particular musical theme。
may be repeated 是被动语态，指主题音乐在影片中反复出现。
in order to remind ... of ... 引导目的状语，remind somebody of something 表示“使某人想起某事”。

sentences.sentence: Film sound comprises conventions and innovations.
sentences.translation: 电影声音既包含常规手法，也包含创新手法。
difficult_points: comprise 表示“包含、由……构成”，此处指电影声音既包含常规手法，也包含创新手法。
conventions and innovations 并列，形成对比。

sentences.sentence: We have come to expect an acceleration of music during car chases and creaky doors in horror films.
sentences.translation: 我们已经逐渐习惯于预期追车场景中音乐节奏的加快，以及恐怖片中门发出的吱呀声。

structure.text: have come to expect an acceleration of music during car chases
and creaky doors in horror films

difficult_points: have come to do 表示“逐渐变得……”，指经过长期观影习惯逐渐形成了这种预期。
an acceleration of music during car chases 与 creaky doors in horror films 是 expect 的两个并列宾语。

sentences.sentence: Yet, it is important to note as well that sound is often brilliantly conceived.
sentences.translation: 然而，同样值得注意的是，声音的设计往往构思精妙。

structure.text: it is important to note as well
that sound is often brilliantly conceived

difficult_points: it is important to note that ... 中 it 是形式主语，真实内容是 that 从句。
as well 意为“也”，呼应上文，表示除了常规手法外还要注意到这一点。
brilliantly conceived 是被动语态，指声音的设计构思十分精妙。

expressions.text: it is important to note that

sentences.sentence: The effects of sound are often largely subtle and often are noted by only our subconscious minds.
sentences.translation: 声音的效果通常在很大程度上是微妙的，也往往只被我们的潜意识所察觉。

structure.text: and often are noted by only our subconscious minds

difficult_points: are noted by only our subconscious minds 是被动语态，指声音效果只被潜意识察觉，而非有意识地注意到。
largely subtle 表示“在很大程度上是微妙的”。

sentences.sentence: We need to foster an awareness of film sound as well as film space so as to truly appreciate an art form that sprang to life during the twentieth century – the modern film.
sentences.translation: 我们需要培养对电影声音以及电影空间的双重意识，才能真正欣赏这门在二十世纪蓬勃兴起的艺术形式——现代电影。

structure.text: need to foster an awareness of film sound as well as film space
so as to truly appreciate an art form
that sprang to life during the twentieth century

difficult_points: as well as 连接 film sound 与 film space，二者并列作 awareness of 的宾语。
so as to 引导目的状语，说明培养这种意识的目的。
that sprang to life during the twentieth century 是修饰 an art form 的定语从句。
破折号后的 the modern film 是对 an art form 的同位语说明，点明所指即“现代电影”。
